description_long: This is a German World War II-era armored combat vehicle with an eight-wheeled configuration and a rotating turret mounted centrally. The vehicle features a long-barreled cannon protruding from the turret, with additional hatches and periscopes visible on the upper hull. The exterior is covered in a mottled camouflage paint scheme, blending greens, browns, and black, and displays military insignia including a cross and numbers. The hull is angular with sloped armor plating, and the wheels are large, robust, and designed for off-road mobility. The rear section includes engine grilles and exhaust outlets, while the front is equipped with a prominent armored plate and headlamps. The vehicle is built primarily from metal, with glass for vision ports and rubber for the tires.
description: An eight-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a rotating turret, long cannon, and mottled camouflage paint, featuring military insignia and robust off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the armored plate, headlamps, and the central cannon barrel extending from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the eight large wheels, sloped armor, turret with cannon, and visible military markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine grilles, exhaust outlets, and the back armor of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wheels, turret, and camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the central turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating, moderate thickness, and angular design for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular patches of green, brown, and black.
attribute_military_markings: Black cross insignia on the turret and hull sides, white numbers on the turret.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rough terrain.
